label: P&L / NAV / Exposure Charts
description: Live vs batch time series comparison of P&L, NAV, and exposure with drift analysis and mode indicators.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.7 empty state added (no-data guard before chart render). 0.8 error state: OverviewData context exposes no error field — widget cannot surface a context error; recorded as known issue for context layer.

checks.0.1: pass — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets globally in widget-wrapper.tsx
checks.0.4: pass — no any types or @ts-ignore in widget file
checks.0.5: pass — no lib/mocks/ imports in widget file
checks.0.6: pass — Spinner renders when timeseriesLoading || liveBatchLoading
checks.0.7: pass — empty state guard added: shows message when all series arrays are empty and not loading
checks.0.8: partial — OverviewData interface exposes no error field; widget cannot surface context errors. Fix requires adding error field to OverviewData + use-overview-page-data.ts (context layer, out of scope for widget-only fix). Recorded as known issue.
checks.0.9: pass — no dead code, no commented-out blocks

checks.1.1: pass — widget reads data exclusively via useOverviewDataSafe(); no inline fetch or direct imports
checks.1.2: pass — use-overview-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() and filters seedTimeSeries, strategyPerformance, aggregatedPnL by scope.organizationIds/clientIds/strategyIds
checks.1.3: pass — seedTimeSeries and strategyPerformance recompute when org filter changes (useMemo deps include organizationIds)
checks.1.4: pass — clientIds cascade applied in strategyPerformance filter and getAggregatedPnlForScope
checks.1.5: pass — strategyIds cascade applied in strategyPerformance filter and getStrategiesForScope
checks.1.6: pass — empty scope arrays pass through to getAggregatedPnlForScope([], [], []) which returns unfiltered dataset
checks.1.7: note — OverviewData interface in overview-data-context.tsx imports TimeSeriesPoint from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data (type-only import). This is a context-layer concern, not widget-layer. Widget file itself has no mock imports.

knownIssues.description: OverviewData context interface exposes no error field. The widget cannot surface context-level errors (timeseries fetch failures, liveBatch failures). Fix requires adding an error field (or firstError) to OverviewData in overview-data-context.tsx and wiring it from use-overview-page-data.ts.
knownIssues.resolution: Add `error: Error | null` to OverviewData interface and wire from use-overview-page-data.ts firstError. Then add error guard in widget before chart render.

knownIssues.description: overview-data-context.tsx imports TimeSeriesPoint and PnLBreakdown types from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data. These are type-only imports but the type source is in the mocks directory rather than lib/types/. Should be moved to lib/types/ or lib/contracts/ as part of mock extraction.
knownIssues.resolution: Move TimeSeriesPoint and PnLBreakdown type definitions to lib/types/trading-data.ts and update all imports.

findings: L0 0.7: Empty state was missing — added no-data guard that triggers when all time series arrays are empty and loading is complete.
L0 0.8: Context layer gap — OverviewData exposes no error field. Widget-level fix blocked; context fix required separately.
L1 1.7: TimeSeriesPoint and PnLBreakdown types live in lib/mocks/fixtures/ — should be promoted to lib/types/.
